image:image.image:title: Skuvra Health Check screen
image:image.image:caption: Skuvra shows PC status, cleanup findings, and safe next steps before cleaning.

image:image.image:title: Skuvra Startup Apps screen
image:image.image:caption: Skuvra separates Windows startup items into keep, optional, review, and needs-attention groups.

image:image.image:title: Skuvra Careful Actions screen
image:image.image:caption: Skuvra keeps registry, update, process, and wipe tools separate from everyday cleanup.
